---
title: "Multiple data types with sdmTMB (tinyVAST replication)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Multiple data types with sdmTMB (tinyVAST replication)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

**If the code in this vignette has not been evaluated, a rendered version is available on the [documentation site](https://sdmTMB.github.io/sdmTMB/index.html) under 'Articles'.**

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
EVAL <- identical(Sys.getenv("NOT_CRAN"), "true") &&
  requireNamespace("tinyVAST", quietly = TRUE) &&
  requireNamespace("sf", quietly = TRUE) &&
  requireNamespace("fmesher", quietly = TRUE)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  eval = EVAL,
  purl = EVAL
)
```

```{r packages}
library(sdmTMB)
library(tinyVAST)
library(sf)
library(fmesher)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

This reproduces the `tinyVAST` vignette
`tinyVAST/vignettes/multiple_data.Rmd` using `sdmTMB`'s multi-family interface
on the same red snapper dataset.

```{r data}
data(red_snapper)
data(red_snapper_shapefile)

plot(
  x = red_snapper$Lon,
  y = red_snapper$Lat,
  col = rainbow(3)[red_snapper$Data_type]
)
plot(red_snapper_shapefile, col = rgb(0, 0, 0, 0.2), add = TRUE)
legend(
  "bottomleft", bty = "n",
  legend = levels(red_snapper$Data_type),
  fill = rainbow(3)
)
```

As in the tinyVAST example, we use:

1. `Encounter`: binomial with cloglog link
2. `Count`: Poisson with log link
3. `Biomass_KG`: Tweedie with log link

```{r family}
family_list <- list(
  Encounter = binomial(link = "cloglog"),
  Count = poisson(link = "log"),
  Biomass_KG = tweedie(link = "log")
)

red_snapper$Data_type <- relevel(red_snapper$Data_type, ref = "Biomass_KG")
```

Fit the `sdmTMB` model:

```{r fit-sdmtmb}

mesh_tv <- fm_mesh_2d(red_snapper[, c("Lon", "Lat")], cutoff = 0.5)
mesh_sd <- make_mesh(red_snapper, c("Lon", "Lat"), mesh = mesh_tv)

# NOTE: for mixed families that include binomial rows, explicit Bernoulli
# trial sizes (weights = 1) are supplied.
fit_sd <- sdmTMB(
  Response_variable ~ Data_type + factor(Year),
  data = red_snapper,
  mesh = mesh_sd,
  time = "Year",
  spatial = "on",
  spatiotemporal = "iid",
  family = family_list,
  distribution_column = "Data_type",
  offset = log(red_snapper$AreaSwept_km2),
  weights = rep(1, nrow(red_snapper)),
  control = sdmTMBcontrol(multiphase = FALSE)
)

fit_sd
```

For a direct replication check, fit tinyVAST with the original settings:

```{r fit-tinyvast}
formula_tv <- Response_variable ~
  Data_type + factor(Year) + offset(log(AreaSwept_km2))

red_snapper$var <- "logdens"

fit_tv <- tinyVAST(
  data = red_snapper,
  formula = formula_tv,
  space_term = "logdens <-> logdens, sd_space",
  spacetime_term = "logdens <-> logdens, 0, sd_spacetime",
  space_columns = c("Lon", "Lat"),
  spatial_domain = mesh_tv,
  time_column = "Year",
  distribution_column = "Data_type",
  family = family_list,
  variable_column = "var"
  # delta_options = list(formula = ~ Data_type + factor(Year) + offset(log(AreaSwept_km2)))
)
```

Construct the prediction grid and calculate annual indices from both models:

```{r index-compare}
sf_grid <- st_make_grid(red_snapper_shapefile, cellsize = c(0.2, 0.2))
sf_grid <- suppressWarnings(st_intersection(sf_grid, red_snapper_shapefile))
sf_grid <- st_make_valid(sf_grid)

grid_coords <- st_coordinates(st_centroid(sf_grid))
areas_km2 <- as.numeric(st_area(sf_grid)) / 1e6
years <- sort(unique(red_snapper$Year))
mean_area_swept <- mean(red_snapper$AreaSwept_km2)

comparison <- lapply(years, function(yr) {
  nd <- data.frame(
    Lat = grid_coords[, "Y"],
    Lon = grid_coords[, "X"],
    Year = yr,
    Data_type = "Biomass_KG",
    AreaSwept_km2 = mean_area_swept,
    var = "logdens"
  )

  # tinyVAST link-scale "p_g" (log density) and integrated index:
  tv_link <- predict(fit_tv, newdata = nd, what = "p_g")
  tv_link <- ifelse(tv_link < max(tv_link - log(100)), NA, tv_link)
  tv_idx <- integrate_output(fit_tv, newdata = nd, area = areas_km2)

  # sdmTMB link-scale estimate and integrated index:
  sd_link <- predict(
    fit_sd,
    newdata = nd,
    type = "link",
    offset = rep(log(mean_area_swept), nrow(nd))
  )
  sd_obj <- predict(
    fit_sd,
    newdata = nd,
    return_tmb_object = TRUE,
    offset = rep(log(mean_area_swept), nrow(nd))
  )
  sd_idx <- get_index(sd_obj, area = areas_km2, bias_correct = TRUE)

  keep <- is.finite(tv_link) & is.finite(sd_link$est)

  data.frame(
    Year = yr,
    tinyVAST_est = unname(tv_idx["Est. (bias.correct)"]),
    tinyVAST_se = unname(tv_idx["Std. Error"]),
    sdmTMB_est = sd_idx$est,
    sdmTMB_se = sd_idx$se_natural,
    map_cor = cor(tv_link[keep], sd_link$est[keep]),
    map_rmse = sqrt(mean((tv_link[keep] - sd_link$est[keep])^2))
  )
})

comparison <- bind_rows(comparison) |>
  mutate(
    index_ratio = sdmTMB_est / tinyVAST_est,
    index_reldiff = (sdmTMB_est - tinyVAST_est) / tinyVAST_est
  )

comparison
```

Summary agreement metrics:

```{r summary-metrics}
comparison |>
  summarise(
    mean_abs_index_reldiff = mean(abs(index_reldiff)),
    mean_map_cor = mean(map_cor)
  )
```

Plot the annual index from both models:

```{r plot-index}
plot_dat <- comparison |>
  transmute(
    Year = factor(Year),
    tinyVAST = tinyVAST_est,
    sdmTMB = sdmTMB_est
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(tinyVAST, sdmTMB), names_to = "Model", values_to = "Estimate")

ggplot(plot_dat, aes(Year, Estimate, group = Model, color = Model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11)
```
